access.label: Πρόσβαση με άσφαλτο
access.notes: Από τις γνωστές ακτές των Οινουσσών με οδική πρόσβαση και μικρή κάθοδο. Μη οργανωμένη, με βότσαλο και βραχώδη σημεία.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3E source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece and in.gr back Chochlakas/Katsika as isolated northwestern Oinousses coves with difficult access and wind exposure; keep hard foot-access warning.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Oinousses Chochlakas and Katsika promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct AllOverGreece and in.gr source notes support identity/location plus recorded difficult access, terrain and no organized services. Source wind-exposure wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.
